description: IDLE_SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS is exported from BOTH types.ts:270 and debounceSchedule.ts:18. Both equal 2000 so functional behaviour is consistent, but there are two named exports of the same constant. CRIT-705 grep checks debounceSchedule.ts only. Risk: a future drift would let one constant become out-of-sync with the other and both grep gates would still pass. Currently no spec authority resolves which is canonical.
suggestedRemediation: Pick one location (verification-architecture §2 already names debounceSchedule.ts as canonical) and re-export from the other: `export { IDLE_SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS } from './debounceSchedule.js';` in types.ts. This way drift is impossible.
